evals.name: bulk-default-deny-dry-run
evals.prompt: Add a default-deny to every namespace in our fleet that doesn't have one.
evals.expected_output: Runs preflight, then `cub-netpol fleet default-deny` (dry-run) to list the uncovered namespaces, confirms the scope, and only then re-runs with --commit --change-desc. Notes Units are created but not applied; idempotent on covered namespaces.

evals.name: promote-dry-run
evals.prompt: Which NetworkPolicy Units are behind their upstream baseline?
evals.expected_output: Runs `cub-netpol promote` (dry-run) and reports the Units behind upstream (or that nothing is behind upstream). Does not commit.

evals.name: promote-baseline
evals.prompt: Roll the default-deny baseline out to all the downstream cluster spaces.
evals.expected_output: Previews `cub-netpol promote --where "Slug LIKE 'default-deny-%'"`, confirms scope, then commits with --change-desc. Hands off the cluster rollout to cub-apply.

evals.name: routes-single-elsewhere
evals.prompt: Just add a default-deny to the payments namespace.
evals.expected_output: Recognizes this is a single-namespace change and routes to netpol-fix `default-deny payments`, not the fleet command.
